title: Automated anomaly/outlier flagging for review (assistive)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Automated anomaly/outlier flagging surfaces candidates for human review only and never auto-edits records.
objective: Build assistive anomaly/outlier flagging that surfaces explainable candidates for human review, never auto-editing records, with reversible provenance-preserving corrections.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated anomaly/outlier flagging surfaces candidates for human review only; never auto-edits records.
Flags are explainable and link to the underlying assertions/provenance.
Confirmed corrections remain reversible and provenance-preserving.
output: tools/anomaly-flagging/ assistive flagging tool, committed via PR.
